name: FLASH X U.N.I.T.Y Pop-Up Cafe
description:
FLASH is a nonprofit Pop-up café experience hosted weekly at UNITY FEC Richmond Hill, supported almost entirely by rescued, donated, or surplus goods. FLASH aims to create a welcoming, low-barrier environment for community members to enjoy free coffee and pastries, connect with local programming, and access costless resources in a warm, dignified setting.
(https://www.thegatonfoundation.org)
FLASH is a summer cafe popup so it should be closed as a public resource until it opens next May 2026

name: Ridgewood Older Adult Center
description:
ROAC is a non profit older adult center offering congregate lunch and activities to 60+ yrs old adults residing in Queens CD5. In addition, the center operates a food pantry program, for the community, on the 2nd and 4th Thursdays of the month, 1pm-3pm. When we do operate our pantry, we check for valid IDs to confirm that a recipient resides in Queens CD5 and we prioritize older adults 60+ yrs old. 

We update operating days for each month on our website, www.roacny.org, as needed.

They’re doing giveaways, and the schedule isn’t fixed,it changes each time. They also have a toy drive and a coat drive. No requirements
